basic_details.job_title: KVK Ariyalur Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: CREED Krishi Vigyan Kendra (ICAR-KVK, hosted by CREED NGO), Ariyalur District, Tamil Nadu
basic_details.short_information: CREED Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK), Ariyalur, operating under ICAR and administratively hosted by the NGO CREED, has released Notification No. 01/2026-CREED KVK inviting applications for 1 post of Assistant. The last date to submit the application is 17.08.2026. This article covers eligibility, age limit, salary, application fee, how to apply, and other details exactly as stated in the official notification.

important_dates.raw: Notification Number: 01/2026-CREED KVK Last date of receipt of application: 17.08.2026 | The notification does not mention a separate application start date, exam date, or interview date. This information is not available in the official notification.

application_fee.details: Fee must be paid via Demand Draft (DD) drawn in favour of "CREED Krishi Vigyan Kendra" Payable at State Bank of India, Udayanatham (Code No. 6719) | No mention is made of online payment options; only Demand Draft is specified.

age_limit.age_details: 27 years (as on closing date of application)

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree from a recognized university
qualification.details: Candidates must hold a Bachelor's degree from a recognized university. No specific subject stream, minimum percentage, or additional certification (such as computer proficiency) is mentioned in the notification. | Maximum age: 27 years Age will be reckoned as on the closing date of application Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/Women and Divyang (PH) candidates as per rules in force. The notification does not specify the exact number of relaxation years for each category - this detail is not available in the official notification. | Knowledge of the local language (Tamil) is preferable. Candidates already in government/other employment can apply through the proper channel and must produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) at the time of interview.

salary_details.details: The selected candidate will be placed in 7th CPC Level 6, with a pay of Rs. 35,400. No further details on allowances, grade pay, or in-hand salary breakup are given in the notification.

selection_process: The notification refers to an Interview stage (candidates in employment must submit an NOC "at the time of interview"). Beyond this
the complete selection process - such as whether there is a written test
or interview weightage - is not available in the official notification.
how_to_apply: Download the application form from the official website: www.kvkariyalur.org
Type or neatly fill in the application form with accurate details.
Attach self-attested copies of all relevant certificates and documents.
Obtain a Demand Draft (Rs. 500/- for General; Rs. 250/- for SC/ST and PH candidates) in favour of "CREED Krishi Vigyan Kendra," payable at State Bank of India, Udayanatham (Code No. 6719).
Superscribe the envelope in bold letters as "APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF ASSISTANT."
Send the completed application to the address below, on or before 17.08.2026.
The Chairman, ICAR - Krishi Vigyan Kendra, Cholamadevi Post, Jayankondam (via), Udayarpalayam Taluk, Ariyalur District - 612 902, Tamil Nadu
important_instructions: The post is co-terminus with the KVK scheme of ICAR, New Delhi. Fill the application form carefully; no request for modification will be entertained after submission. Local language (Tamil) is preferable. Persons already employed must apply through the proper channel and produce an NOC at the interview. Applications must be submitted in the prescribed proforma, strictly typed or handwritten. Candidates must ensure they meet all eligibility criteria before applying; any false information found at any stage can lead to cancellation of application or appointment. No correspondence will be entertained regarding selection, interview, or appointment. Applications must reach before the last date; the institute is not responsible for postal delays, and late applications will not be considered. The Chairman, CREED KVK, reserves the right to cancel the recruitment to the post without assigning any reason.

rows.details: CREED Krishi Vigyan Kendra (ICAR-KVK, hosted by CREED NGO), Ariyalur District, Tamil Nadu
27 years (as on closing date of application)

Offline (download, fill, and send by post)

content_sections.heading: KVK Ariyalur Notification 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Number: 01/2026-CREED KVK Last date of receipt of application: 17.08.2026 The notification does not mention a separate application start date, exam date, or interview date. This information is not available in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: KVK Ariyalur - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The post of Assistant is co-terminus with the KVK scheme of the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR), New Delhi, meaning the position's tenure is linked to the continuation of the scheme.

content_sections.heading: KVK Ariyalur Assistant Recruitment - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must hold a Bachelor's degree from a recognized university. No specific subject stream, minimum percentage, or additional certification (such as computer proficiency) is mentioned in the notification. Maximum age: 27 years Age will be reckoned as on the closing date of application Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/Women and Divyang (PH) candidates as per rules in force. The notification does not specify the exact number of relaxation years for each category - this detail is not available in the official notification. Knowledge of the local language (Tamil) is preferable. Candidates already in government/other employment can apply through the proper channel and must produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) at the time of interview.

content_sections.heading: KVK Ariyalur Assistant Salary and Pay Scale
content_sections.text: The selected candidate will be placed in 7th CPC Level 6, with a pay of Rs. 35,400. No further details on allowances, grade pay, or in-hand salary breakup are given in the notification.

content_sections.heading: KVK Ariyalur Application Fee
content_sections.text: Fee must be paid via Demand Draft (DD) drawn in favour of "CREED Krishi Vigyan Kendra" Payable at State Bank of India, Udayanatham (Code No. 6719) No mention is made of online payment options; only Demand Draft is specified.

content_sections.heading: KVK Ariyalur Selection Process
content_sections.text: The notification refers to an Interview stage (candidates in employment must submit an NOC "at the time of interview"). Beyond this, the complete selection process - such as whether there is a written test, shortlisting criteria, or interview weightage - is not available in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for KVK Ariyalur Assistant Application
content_sections.text: Neatly typed, filled-in application form (downloaded from www.kvkariyalur.org) Self-attested copies of certificates/documents supporting all claims made in the application (educational qualification, age proof, category certificate, etc.) Demand Draft for the applicable application fee Recent photograph (a photo box is provided on the application form) No Objection Certificate (NOC), if already employed - to be produced at the time of interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for KVK Ariyalur Assistant Post 2026
content_sections.text: Download the application form from the official website: www.kvkariyalur.org Type or neatly fill in the application form with accurate details. Attach self-attested copies of all relevant certificates and documents. Obtain a Demand Draft (Rs. 500/- for General; Rs. 250/- for SC/ST and PH candidates) in favour of "CREED Krishi Vigyan Kendra," payable at State Bank of India, Udayanatham (Code No. 6719). Superscribe the envelope in bold letters as "APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF ASSISTANT." Send the completed application to the address below, on or before 17.08.2026. The Chairman, ICAR - Krishi Vigyan Kendra, Cholamadevi Post, Jayankondam (via), Udayarpalayam Taluk, Ariyalur District - 612 902, Tamil Nadu

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for KVK Ariyalur Candidates
content_sections.text: The post is co-terminus with the KVK scheme of ICAR, New Delhi. Fill the application form carefully; no request for modification will be entertained after submission. Local language (Tamil) is preferable. Persons already employed must apply through the proper channel and produce an NOC at the interview. Applications must be submitted in the prescribed proforma, strictly typed or handwritten. Candidates must ensure they meet all eligibility criteria before applying; any false information found at any stage can lead to cancellation of application or appointment. No correspondence will be entertained regarding selection, interview, or appointment. Applications must reach before the last date; the institute is not responsible for postal delays, and late applications will not be considered. The Chairman, CREED KVK, reserves the right to cancel the recruitment to the post without assigning any reason.

content_sections.heading: KVK Ariyalur Application Form: Details Required
content_sections.text: The application form (enclosed with the notification) asks candidates to furnish: Name, Date of Birth, Age as on closing date, Gender Correspondence and Permanent Address, Telephone/Mobile number, Email ID Nationality, Religion, Community (SC/ST/GEN/OBC) Whether physically handicapped (Yes/No, with details if applicable) Languages known, Marital status Application fee particulars (DD number, date, amount) Educational qualification details (S.S.L.C., H.S.C., Bachelor's degree, Master's degree - school/college, board/university, year of passing, percentage/OGPA) Additional qualifications, if any Experience details (organization, post held, last pay drawn, period, reason for leaving, total length of service) A written note (up to 250 words) on experience in handling accounts, if any Declaration, signature, place, and date

content_sections.heading: Important Links
content_sections.text: official Notification PDF: Click Here Official Website: www.kvkariyalur.org Notification Number: 01/2026-CREED KVK

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KVK Ariyalur Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date of receipt of application is 17.08.2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in KVK Ariyalur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the post of Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the KVK Ariyalur Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's degree from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for KVK Ariyalur Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 27 years as on the closing date of application, with relaxation applicable for SC/ST/OBC/Women and Divyang (PH) candidates as per rules in force.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Assistant post at KVK Ariyalur?
faq.answer: The pay scale is 7th CPC Level 6 (Rs. 35,400).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for KVK Ariyalur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Rs. 500/- for General candidates and Rs. 250/- for SC/ST and Physically Challenged candidates, payable via Demand Draft in favour of "CREED Krishi Vigyan Kendra."

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the KVK Ariyalur Assistant post?
faq.answer: Download the application form from www.kvkariyalur.org, fill it neatly, attach self-attested documents and the DD, and send it by post to the Chairman, ICAR-Krishi Vigyan Kendra, Cholamadevi Post, Jayankondam (via), Udayarpalayam Taluk, Ariyalur District – 612 902, Tamil Nadu, before 17.08.2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is online application available for KVK Ariyalur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. The notification specifies only offline submission by post; no online application portal is mentioned.
